paragraph_or_text_span: Voice Problems: Updates to Treatment and Care of Patients with Hoarseness March 1, 2018 March 1, 2018 Share ALEXANDRIA, VA — The American Academy of Otolaryngology—Head and Neck Surgery Foundation published the Clinical Practice Guideline: Hoarseness (Dysphonia) (Update) today in Otolaryngology–Head and Neck Surgery. heading_path: Voice Problems: Updates to Treatment and Care of Patients with Hoarseness
paragraph_or_text_span: What is the purpose of this guideline? The primary purpose of this guideline is to improve the quality of care for patients with hoarseness, based on current best evidence.
